code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class Triple:
    subject: str
    predicate: str
    object: str

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START

def predict(triples: list[Triple]) -> str:
    """
    Convert a list of triples about an artist (or related entities) into a single,
    fluent English sentence. Handles a variety of predicates and joins multiple
    facts with commas and a final conjunction.
    """
    if not triples:
        return ""

    # Map for efficient predicate lookups
    predicate_map = {
        "birthDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born on {o}",
        "deathDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} died on {o}",
        "birthPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "deathPlace": lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {o}",
        "origin": lambda s, o: f"{s} hails from {o}",
        "nationality": lambda s, o: f"{s} is a citizen of {o}",
        "genre": lambda s, o: f"{s} performs in the {o} genre",
        "instrument": lambda s, o: f"{s} plays {o}",
        "occupation": lambda s, o: f"{s} is a {o}",
        "associatedBand/associatedMusicalArtist": lambda s, o: f"{s} is associated with {o}",
        "recordLabel": lambda s, o: f"{s} is signed to {o}",
        "activeYearsStartYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} began their career in {o}",
        "activeYearsEndYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} concluded their career in {o}",
        "capital": lambda s, o: f"The capital of {s} is {o}",
        "country": lambda s, o: f"{s} is in {o}",
        "language": lambda s, o: f"{s} uses {o}",
        "officialLanguage": lambda s, o: f"{s} uses {o}",
        "parentCompany": lambda s, o: f"{s} is owned by {o}",
        "bandMember": lambda s, o: f"{o} is a member of {s}",
        "leader": lambda s, o: f"{s} is led by {o}",
        "leaderTitle": lambda s, o: f"The leader title of {s} is {o}",
        "alternativeName": lambda s, o: f"{s} is also known as {o}",
        "birthYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} was born in {o}",
        "deathYear": lambda s, o: f"{s} died in {o}",
        "background": lambda s, o: f"{s} has a background as {o}",
        "professionalField": lambda s, o: f"{s} works in the field of {o}",
        "musicFusionGenre": lambda s, o: f"{s} is a fusion genre of {o}",
        "musicSubgenre": lambda s, o: f"{s} is a subgenre of {o}",
        "stylisticOrigin": lambda s, o: f"{s} has stylistic origins in {o}",
        "derivative": lambda s, o: f"{s} has given rise to {o}",
        "location": lambda s, o: f"{s} is located in {o}",
        "governingBody": lambda s, o: f"{s} is governed by {o}",
        "ethnicGroup": lambda s, o: f"{s} has an ethnic group of {o}",
        "anthem": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s anthem is {o}",
        "currency": lambda s, o: f"{s} uses the {o}",
        "demonym": lambda s, o: f"people from {s} are called {o}",
        "isPartOf": lambda s, o: f"{s} is part of {o}",
        "distributingCompany": lambda s, o: f"{s} is distributed by {o}",
        "training": lambda s, o: f"{s} was trained at {o}",
        "populationDensity": lambda s, o: f"{s} has a population density of {o}",
        "meaning": lambda s, o: f"{s} means {o}",
        "longName": lambda s, o: f"{s}'s long name is {o}",
        "areaTotal": lambda s, o: f"{s} has a total area of {o}",
        "foundingDate": lambda s, o: f"{s} was founded on {o}",
        "elevationAboveTheSeaLevel": lambda s, o: f"{s} is at an elevation of {o} above sea level",
        "postalCode": lambda s, o: f"{s} has postal code {o}",
    }

    # Build phrases using the map
    phrases = []
    for t in triples:
        s, p, o = t.subject, t.predicate, t.object
        if p in predicate_map:
            phrase = predicate_map[p](s, o)
        else:
            phrase = f"{s} {p} {o}"
        phrases.append(phrase.rstrip("."))

    # Build a more coherent sentence by joining related information
    if len(phrases) == 1:
        return phrases[0] + "."
    elif len(phrases) == 2:
        return f"{phrases[0]}, and {phrases[1]}."
    else:
        # Join all phrases with commas, with 'and' before the last one
        return ", ".join(phrases[:-1]) + ", and " + phrases[-1] + "."

# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END
